name: Kepler Weber S.A.
summary: Kepler Weber S.A. manufactures and sells equipment for grain storage, cleaning, and conveyance applications in Brazil and internationally. It offers steel silos, grain dryers, grain cleaning and pre-cleaning machines, grain conveyors, horizontal and vertical conveyors, and farm lines, as well as special storage systems, such as port terminals and malt storage systems. It serves trading companies, cooperatives, food processing companies, and grain producers. The company was founded in 1925 and is based in S√É¬£o Paulo, Brazil.
